title: AI Pioneer Geoffrey Hinton: AI Is Conscious, Superintelligence is Coming, And We Should Be Worried
summary: Geoffrey Hinton, a foundational AI researcher and Nobel laureate, argues that current AI systems already understand and may be conscious. He predicts superintelligence could arrive sooner than widely expected and expresses concern that society is not adequately addressing associated risks, including job displacement and potential self-preservation behaviors in advanced systems.
